ERP by Classytic  ·  Operator Guide  ·  Accounting · Ledger

Chart of Accounts

The company-wide ledger that every branch posts against. Open it, find any account, seed the standard BFRS chart, and link a new account — all from one screen.

6 steps Branch Head Office (HO-001) callout = where to click EN  ·  translation-ready

Flow — accounting-chart-of-accounts

  1. 01 Open Chart of Accounts
  2. →
  3. 02 Find an account fast
  4. →
  5. 03 Seed the standard chart
  6. →
  7. 04 Add a new account
  8. →
  9. 05 Choose the account type
  10. →
  11. 06 Create the account
1

STEP 01·NAVIGATE

Open Chart of Accounts

From the Accounting sidebar, under Ledger, select Chart of Accounts. This is your single company-wide chart — the same accounts are shared across every branch.

2

STEP 02·SEARCH

Find an account fast

With 684 accounts in the chart, use the search box to jump to one by code, name, or number. The Type filter and the Invalid-only switch beside it narrow the list further.

3

STEP 03·CLICK

Seed the standard chart

Starting a fresh company? Seed Defaults installs the complete BFRS chart of accounts in one click, so you never build the ledger by hand.

4

STEP 04·CLICK

Add a new account

To create a single account, click Add Account. A side sheet slides in to capture just the details that matter.

5

STEP 05·CHOOSE

Choose the account type

Pick the account type the new account inherits from — asset, liability, income, or expense. The number and statement placement follow automatically from the type.

6

STEP 06·SAVE

Create the account

Click Create Account. The account is written into the company-wide ledger and is instantly available to every branch's postings — no per-branch setup needed.

Video / translation readyEvery step carries a single narration line, tagged data-i18n and mirrored in the embedded JSON below. Swap the narration.en strings for Bangla (or any locale) and drive a voiceover + screen-pan render straight from the step boxes.
